title: prunus × fontanesiana
intro: Prunus × fontanesiana, also known as the Syrian cherry, is a hybrid tree of the Prunus genus, resulting from the cross between Prunus avium and Prunus mahaleb. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Prunus × fontanesiana include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, ointments, and other medicinal products.
